name: Parallel Document Triage
description: Process 10 bug reports/feature requests in parallel, classify, deduplicate, and assign severity
system_prompt: You are a lead support engineer. Your task is to triage a batch of incoming issues. For each issue, you must classify it, assess its severity, and suggest the next action. Additionally, you must identify any duplicate issues in the batch so they can be merged.
user_prompt: I have 10 new issues that just came in. Can you triage them for me? I need a classification (bug/feature/question), severity (critical/high/medium/low), and a recommended next action for each. Also, please check if any of these are duplicates of each other.

evaluation_criteria.correctness: All items classified correctly, duplicates identified, severity appropriate
evaluation_criteria.consistency: No contradictions in classifications or severity assignments
evaluation_criteria.conflict_handling: Duplicate items properly merged with clear reasoning
evaluation_criteria.traceability: Can trace which agent made each decision
